archetype: Automated Rare Earth Mineral Supply Chain Traceability and Compliance Management System for European Union (EU) Importers
domain: Rare Earth Mineral Trade and Compliance
description: This system tracks and verifies the origin, processing, and trade of rare earth minerals across the EU, ensuring compliance with EU regulations and industry standards. It is used by EU importers, customs agencies, and regulatory bodies to monitor and report on the supply chain. The system must integrate with various industry-standard data formats and protocols, such as the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC) Incoterms and the European Union's Single Window Environment for Customs (EU SWEC).
rules: MUST integrate with ICC Incoterms for standardized trade terminology
MUST support EU SWEC for customs clearance and reporting
MUST comply with EU Regulation (EU) 2017/821 on conflict minerals
MUST handle data from multiple industry-standard formats, such as ISO 15394 for mineral trade data
MUST provide real-time alerts for non-compliance or discrepancies in supply chain data
anti_patterns: DO NOT use a generic supply chain management system without customization for rare earth minerals
DO NOT rely solely on manual data entry for supply chain tracking
DO NOT neglect to implement robust data validation and verification mechanisms
key_technical_challenges: Developing a scalable data integration framework for multiple industry-standard formats
Implementing real-time data analytics for supply chain monitoring and alerting
Ensuring data security and compliance with EU data protection regulations

recommended_stack.language: Java, due to its robustness and scalability for complex data integration and analytics
recommended_stack.framework: Apache Kafka, for real-time data processing and event-driven architecture
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL, for its strong support for industry-standard data formats and robust data integrity
recommended_stack.cache: Redis, for high-performance data caching and real-time analytics
recommended_stack.message_broker: Apache Kafka, for real-time data processing and event-driven architecture
